title: Sum fails to work

posts.author: johnners (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

I’m running a formula which takes a total column and minus’s any cost, then displays the profit - however for some reason it isn’t showing correctly at the bottom of each group.

total1318×380 30.1 KB

If I set the formula to SUM({Total Value}-{Suppliers Cost}) then it works fine, however it only shows one decimal place - is there a way to set the decimals to £##.##?
